fixSummaryByRootCause.clarification_punt_for_history_query: Made event outcome comparison resolve or auto-select a live multi-outcome fallback event instead of erroring when the prompt is deictic.
fixSummaryByRootCause.unnecessary_clarification: Strengthened direct-event tool descriptions so live-volume prompts route straight to event resolution instead of asking the user to choose an internal method.
fixSummaryByRootCause.missing_event_resolution: Extended event comparison to execute with generic or empty event references by grounding to a live fallback event and exposing the selection reason.
fixSummaryByRootCause.wrong_initial_tool_selection: Clarified efficiency-tool routing and explicitly warned planner prompts away from whale-holder tools for vig and spread analysis.
fixSummaryByRootCause.missing_market_resolution: Allowed single-market whale analysis to run without an explicit identifier by selecting a strong live single-outcome fallback market.
fixSummaryByRootCause.missing_grounded_market_reference: Reinforced direct rules-tool usage for deictic single-market prompts so the planner can ground rules analysis without an explicit slug.
fixSummaryByRootCause.deictic_contract_substitution: Tightened cross-venue contract matching by improving fallback contract resolution and raising Kalshi match-score safety thresholds.
fixSummaryByRootCause.deictic_event_substitution: Reinforced direct multi-outcome event tool usage so whale/event prompts can ground to a live fallback event instead of stalling.
fixSummaryByRootCause.candidate_selection_drift: Kept ending-soon selection strict so tape/open-interest screens no longer silently drift to far-dated volume fallbacks.
fixSummaryByRootCause.upstream_listing_mismatch: Made Kalshi cross-reference matching more conservative so weak fuzzy matches are filtered out instead of being presented as equivalents.
fixSummaryByRootCause.overstated_synthesis: Raised the high-conviction bar so flat or negative model-edge setups are downgraded instead of being marketed as high conviction.
fixSummaryByRootCause.limited_scan_scope: Expanded trending-market scan breadth and made sampled-scope language explicit in the trend summary output.
